violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. The buckets in the ice cream machine area did not test for the proper concentration of sanitizer. These need to be changed.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The shelves above the slushie and ice cream machine need to be cleaned.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. White cardboard cake bases at the cake station were not inverted.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The walls above the slushie machine needs to be cleaned.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Clean, proper temperature, cleaning agent (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
